message:
Fix canGoNext to use correct array for carousel layout

In carousel layout, keyboard navigation should check against
filteredEndorsements.length, not otherItems.length, since the
carousel displays filteredEndorsements directly without removing
a featured item.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
